title: stenia tigrina
intro: Stenia tigrina, also known as the Tiger Stenia, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenia tigrina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by drying and steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
